reason: FastAPI works cleanly with SQLAlchemy and PostgreSQL for typed API products.
Redis adds cache and background coordination for FastAPI services.
FastAPI containers are simple to package and deploy.
Firebase Auth can work, but custom backend authorization requires extra integration.
React consumes FastAPI REST endpoints through a clean API boundary.
React and Vue are alternative frontend frameworks for the same UI layer.
Next.js is React-based, but a project should usually choose SPA React or Next.js as the app shell.
Using two primary databases increases operational complexity for MVPs.
Dockerized services deploy well to AWS container services.
Render supports simple Docker-based web service deployment.
